questions.question: A box contains 3 types of pens, 4 colours of pencils, and 5 types of papers. If 2 pens and 3 pencils are to be selected, how many different combinations can be made?
questions.hint: Use the combination formula to solve this problem.

questions.question: A group of 5 people want to choose a committee of 3 to represent them. How many different permutations can be made?
A bag contains 5 red marbles, 3 blue marbles, and 2 green marbles. If 8 marbles are to be selected, how many different combinations can be made?
questions.hint: Use the combination with repetition formula to solve this problem.
